description: Camera moves demo.
Caption styles cycle.
Single caption demo.
Cinematic text bar demo.
Color filter demo.
Fade demo.
Flash demo.
Flashback demo.
Letterbox demo on entry.
Short intro when entering the market plaza.
Narration panel demo.
Pan-only demo.
Particles presets at the bay.
Ring demo.
Shake demo.
Speed lines demo.
Tilt test.
Short intro when entering the residential square.
Auto-run VFX showcase when entering the VFX Stage.
Vignette demo.
Demonstrates bar wipe variants.
Zoom and pan test.
Zoom-only demo.
After the intro, this spawns the player in Nova's bunk and begins the fade-in.
Starts Wake Up Call if the player enters Nova's bunk without active quest state.
Marks Nova's bunk check for Wake Up Call.

actions.message: The bunk is hard, narrow, and still warm from the few hours of sleep you stole from the shift clock. It is not much, but it is yours.

description: Marks Nova's possessions check for Wake Up Call.

actions.message: The cargo netting holds a few tools, a spare ration, and the small metal carving Jed made for you when you were younger.

description: Marks the first route out of the Pit sleeping level.
Marks arrival at Jed's Workshop.
Shows the tinkering tutorial when Nova opens Jed's workbench after talking to him.
Completes Wake Up Call when Nova repairs the Cryo-Inductor at Jed's workbench.
Starts Paperwork when Nova reaches the Transit Checkpoint after Wake Up Call.
Marks the booth objective once Nova reaches Zeke's window.
Marks discovery of Scrapper's hidden rebel cache.
Marks the rebel cache opening and sends Nova back to Scrapper.

actions.message: The cache holds old resistance grenades and names scratched into the lid.

description: Marks entry into the med-bay ventilation route.
Marks the toxic vent patch and sends Nova back to Doc.

actions.message: The vent coughs, then clears. The med-bay can breathe again.

description: Marks the loader startup step in Heavy Lifting.
Marks the cargo movement setup step in Heavy Lifting.

actions.message: Hydraulic Kick online. The shield trainer is ready.

description: Completes Heavy Lifting when Nova defeats the shielded training guard.

actions.note: Victory reveals a tucked maintenance alcove with salvageable bits.
Gives a Noise Maker so the player can attempt a stealth bypass.
A salvaged stabilizer plate needed for final assembly.
Mekk points out a fragment tucked behind a weak panel.

description: Plays the camera test cinematic upon entering Tyson's room.
Runs the full VFX showcase when the player enters the shop.
Activates the Stellarium Mine generator and restores lighting.
Deactivates the Stellarium Mine generator and turns off lighting.
Turns on the west breaker.
Turns off the west breaker.
Turns on the east breaker.
Turns off the east breaker.
Show tutorial after the player loses a combat.

do.message: You were overwhelmed. Try using shields, items, or a different approach.

description: Restores power to the mine and unlocks the adjacent tunnels.

actions.message: The generator hums back to life, unlocking the northern gate.
Some vents open deeper in the mines.

description: Starts Main Quest 3 when Nova reaches the Admin Concourse Lobby.
Sets the room state for admin_lobby when the player finishes talking to Bogs.
Marks the elevator task complete when entering the deep mine landing.
Marks the first deep mine encounter complete when Nova defeats the rock borer.
Marks the Acoustic Bulwark task complete when Nova defeats the Acoustic Bulwark.
Marks the threshold task complete when entering the ancient threshold room.
Marks the reach echo chamber task complete when entering the echo gap.
Completes the relic touch and sync sequence when Nova interacts with the Tuning Fork.
Starts Main Quest 4 (Red Alert) when Main Quest 3 completes.

actions.message: WARNING: Biological contamination detected. Sector lockdown active.

description: Triggers Zeke's comms instruction when Nova enters the emergency exit tunnel.

actions.message: Zeke: 'Nova! Do you hear me? The Warden sealed the core, but I've bypassed the emergency exit. Get to the cargo lift! I'll try to hold the security gates from here!'

description: Marks the escape gauntlet task done when Nova defeats a security drone or enforcer.
Marks the reach cargo lift task done when Nova enters the Cargo Lift room.
Completes Main Quest 4 (Red Alert) when Nova talks to Jed and receives the Chime.
Marks launch access gauntlet task done when security drone is defeated.
Advances quest to defeat_warden stage upon entering the Pod Bay.
Sets warden_defeated room state and advances quest to launch stage when Warden is defeated.
Handles the navigation console interaction inside the pod core.

do.message: The console is locked. It needs a physical Chime bypass to override the Dominion shield frequency.

description: Triggered when player interacts with the hacked terminal in server hub. Starts and completes SQ04.
Triggered when entering mine_shunt. Starts SQ05.
Triggered when player interacts with the datapad in side shunt 4. Completes SQ05.
Examine the sub-critical pod core and recover the Chime.

actions.message: You open the steaming access panel of the pod core. Inside, the Chime is intact, humming in a quiet, stable resonance. You recover it along with an emergency medkit and compact field fishing kit from the crash reserves.

description: Completes A Strange Coast when entering the glow-water stream.

actions.message:
Quest Complete: A Strange Coast

You trace the glowing water to a wider path leading deeper into the ancient ruins. The resonance of the planet surface hums in your Echo marks.
